zh.lifeSummary: Anthoinette De Dol於大約1100年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼。她和Bernard De Sablé至少有1個女兒。她去世在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特拉 福利艾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Cornelis, Kees, Dirk, Klaas, Pieter.  German Erwin, Gerhard, Otto.
Dutch and German: variant of   Bolle  .
French: from Bol(l)o, a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the element bolo ‘friend’, ‘brother’.

variants.name: Bolle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Ilse, Kurt, Manfred, Otto.  Scandinavian Arlys.
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, a short form of various compound names with the first element bald ‘bold’.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bolo, Bollo, a short form of various compound names with the first element bolo ‘friend’, ‘brother’.

nameMeanings.name: Anthoinette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Antoine  , which has become popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Anthoinette De Dol was born about 1100, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. She had at least 1 daughter with Bernard De Sablé. She died in La Flèche, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthoinette De Dolは約1100年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた。彼女はBernard De Sabléとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスラ フルeチェで死去した。

ko.Sablé-sur-Sarthe, La Flèche, Sarthe, Pay: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 플e체
ko.lifeSummary: Anthoinette De Dol(은)는 대략 1100년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Bernard De Sablé(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 플e체에서 사망했다.
